cmi.ponder.tag.smeltery.description: Tinker's components used to smelting and casting
cmi.ponder.tag.ae2: [ae2:fluix_glass_cable, ae2:condenser, ae2:controller, ae2:pattern_provider, ae2:crafting_unit, ae2:drive, ae2:me_p2p_tunnel, ae2:quantum_ring, ae2:spatial_io_port, ae2:spatial_pylon, ae2:wireless_access_point]
cmi.ponder.tag.other: [portality:controller, portality:frame, portality:module_items, portality:module_fluids, portality:module_energy, portality:module_interdimensional, immersiveindustry:crucible, immersiveindustry:burning_chamber, immersiveengineering:blastfurnace_preheater, immersiveengineering:blastbrick, cmi:crucible_base, cmi:crucible_tuyere, mekanism:cardboard_box]
cmi.ponder.ae2_gui2.header: 自动化配置案例——“燃料”类配方
cmi.ponder.alloyer_building.text_1: The Alloyer is very similar to The Melter
cmi.ponder.alloyer_building.text_2: This is a specialized device for making alloys
cmi.ponder.alloyer_building.text_3: Place containers on sides of Alloyer
cmi.ponder.alloyer_building.text_5: Then it will automatically make alloys
cmi.ponder.casting.text_1: Scorched casting containers must be used with casts
cmi.ponder.fluid_cannon_using.text_1: Fluid Cannon can shoot fluid and different fluids have different effects
cmi.ponder.foundry_building.text_1: The Foundry is very similar to The Smeltery
cmi.ponder.foundry_building.text_2: But it uses scorched blocks and its edges must be filled
cmi.ponder.foundry_building.text_3: The outer wall can also be extended upwards by up to 63 blocks
cmi.ponder.foundry_building.text_4:
The Foundry has unique features:
It will produce some by-products when smelting
And it can't be used to make alloys
cmi.ponder.heater_using.text_1: The Heater can burn solid fuel to provide a temperature of 800℃
cmi.ponder.melter_building.text_1: The Melter is your first device as a tinker
cmi.ponder.melter_building.text_2: It requires a heater for heat
cmi.ponder.melter_building.text_3: The Heater needs fuel to work
cmi.ponder.melter_building.text_4: Or you can use fuel tank
cmi.ponder.melter_building.text_5: Also, don’t forget to add fuel such as Lava
cmi.ponder.missing_title.text_3: You can either use GUI or automation input
cmi.ponder.missing_title.text_4: Ingredients can also insert into crucible on the top
cmi.ponder.missing_title.text_5: Coke coal can be inserted into the burners
cmi.ponder.missing_title.text_6: Products can be extracted from the sides of the crucible
cmi.ponder.sand_casting.text_1: Sand Cast can only be used once
cmi.ponder.sand_casting.text_2: Right Click with item to make shape
cmi.ponder.smeltery_building.text_1: The bottom of the Smelter is a rectangle composed of seared blocks
cmi.ponder.smeltery_building.text_2: The maximum size of a rectangle is 14x14 blocks
cmi.ponder.smeltery_building.text_3: You need place a controller outside the second layer
cmi.ponder.smeltery_building.text_4: You need to place at least one tank for fuel
cmi.ponder.smeltery_building.text_5: To cast, you need plate a drain
cmi.ponder.smeltery_building.text_6: The second layer should be closed
cmi.ponder.smeltery_building.text_8: The outer wall can be extended upwards by up to 63 blocks
cmi.ponder.smeltery_building.text_9: Don’t forget to add fuel such as Lava
cmi.ponder.smeltery_using.text_1: Right Click to open the GUI of the Smeltery
cmi.ponder.smeltery_using.text_2: You can put items in the GUI to start melting
cmi.ponder.smeltery_using.text_3: And next, some functional blocks are introduced
cmi.ponder.smeltery_using.text_4: The Chute can input and output items to and from the Smeltery
cmi.ponder.smeltery_using.text_5: The Drain and Duct can input and output fluids to and from the Smeltery
cmi.ponder.smeltery_using.text_6: The Duct has a GUI with a slot that can filter fluids
cmi.ponder.smeltery_using.text_7: Try put a Can with Molten Gold
cmi.ponder.tank.text_1: Tinker's fluid containers roughly divided into 4 categories
cmi.ponder.tank.text_2: Gauge: holds 48 ingots of fluid, retains liquid when broken
cmi.ponder.tank.text_3: Tank: holds 48 ingots of fluid, retains liquid when broken
cmi.ponder.tank.text_4: Casting Tank: interacts with items, retains liquid when broken
cmi.ponder.tank.text_5: Proxy Tank: interacts with items, agents item inside
ae2.ponder.crafting_cpu_structure.text_1: As just presented, Me networks need a Crafting CPU to automize recipes
ae2.ponder.crafting_cpu_structure.text_2: Crafting CPU consists of 8 types of blocks divided into 4 groups
ae2.ponder.furnace_automation.text_1: Patterns in the Pattern Provider only detects the input and output of the recipe
ae2.ponder.furnace_automation.text_2: As a consequence, it's free to edit any type of recipy, almost all recipes in this modpack
ae2.ponder.spatial_storage.text_1: Spatial Pylons and Spatial IO Port are devices on spatial storage and transportation
